headlines.title: Israeli army raids Palestinian charity in Nablus, orders year-long closure
headlines.snippet: Israeli army raids Palestinian charity in Nablus, orders year-long closure Israeli military forces raided the headquarters of the Solidarity Charity Association in the occupied West Bank’s Nablus on Tuesday, declaring the organisation closed for a year, the Palestinian news agency WAFA reported.
